title: Define product selection criteria and scoring matrix
description: As a founder/operator, I want a clear scoring matrix for project ideas, so that we choose the best first product objectively.

title: Evaluate top 3 ideas against scoring matrix
description: Using the Weighted Decision Matrix, evaluate potential project ideas to prioritize the top 3.

title: Select first product to build
description: Select the highest priority project idea based on the Weighted Decision Matrix and begin high-level scoping.
